claim_boundary: Tier 4.31b is local fixed-point reference/parity evidence only. A pass supports C/runtime implementation work for the named seven-EMA fading-memory temporal subset. It does not prove C implementation, SpiNNaker hardware transfer, speedup, multi-chip scaling, nonlinear recurrence, universal benchmark superiority, language, planning, AGI, or ASI.
tier: Tier 4.31b - Native Temporal-Substrate Local Fixed-Point Reference
